caption: The video opens with a vibrant and dynamic illustration welcoming viewers to the OpenStack Barcelona Summit. The scene is set against a bright blue sky, featuring a playful pigeon character wearing a red cap and sunglasses, holding a spray paint can. The pigeon appears to be in motion, adding a sense of energy and creativity to the image. To the right, a cable car with passengers is suspended in the air, suggesting an urban setting. The skyline of Barcelona is visible in the background, with iconic buildings and structures silhouetted against the sky. The text "Welcome to the OpenStack Barcelona Summit" is prominently displayed in bold, colorful letters, emphasizing the event's theme and location. The overall atmosphere is lively and engaging, capturing the excitement and innovation associated with the OpenStack community.
